caption: A man wearing a white baseball cap, black headphones, and a black hoodie with "BOSS" printed in gold lettering sits in a studio setting. He is positioned behind a dark desk equipped with a professional microphone on a swivel arm and a black mug featuring the text "BOSS TALK OUT". Behind him is a white backdrop with a repeating logo that includes five gold stars and the word "HUSTLE". A blue sign above him reads "Where BOSSES Talk!". In the lower left corner of the scene, a small logo containing the word "BOSS" is visible. Throughout the sequence, the man remains seated and facing forward, slightly shifting his gaze and facial expression while appearing to speak into the microphone. The camera remains stationary, capturing the man from the chest up against the branded studio background.
